headline: Anthropic moved Claude into Slack with a scoped agent identity, pushing access control and audit trails into breakout.
body: Anthropic released Claude Tag, which invokes Claude inside Slack threads while maintaining channel context and persisting work across days, and paired it with an agent identity model that gives Claude its own scoped identity rather than impersonating users, governed by admin controls and full auditability. That launch drives the breakout in access-control and audit-trail and connects to a broader agentic-economy discussion from Google DeepMind on millions of autonomous agents transacting under risks like automation bias and security. Separately, transformer internals surged on the strength of visual explainer content covering feed-forward networks, residual connections, and text embeddings. Workflow tooling rounded out the window, including Claude plus NotebookLM automation and an AI resume builder.
